title: Can't use Go bindings on Windows
body:
### Issue Description

I am trying to develop a Go application that needs to connect to Podman. I am trying to use the Podman Go bindings but my application refuses to start (my application entry point is not even reached).



### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Clone github.com/jeffmaury/podcl
2. `set CGO_ENABLED=0`
3. `go run -tags "containers_image_openpgp exclude_graphdriver_btrfs exclude_graphdriver_devicemapper exclude_graphdriver_overlay"  podcl`



### Describe the results you received

Error message:

```
time="2023-02-23T09:05:09+01:00" level=error msg="validating engine configs: static directory must be an absolute path - instead got \"\\\\var\\\\lib\\\\containers\\\\storage\\\\libpod\""

Process finished with the exit code 1
```


### Describe the results you expected

Application main entry point should be reached

### Additional information

_No response_

comments.body: https://github.com/jeffmaury/podcl is empty. What version of the podman module are you using in your code? I also recommend you add the `remote` build tag as well, that might already fix the issue but I am not sure.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
